name: Tamarind Chipotle Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Block of Tamarind paste - about 14 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the tamarind paste to the water and heat gently, stirring until smooth.
2. Place the mixture in a blender and puree together with the sugar, garlic, chipotles, and adobo sauce.
3. Add the lime juice and blend in.
4. Serve slightly warmed. This sauce pairs well with any pork dish, especially barbecued pork, or with seafood such as shrimp and soft-shelled crab, especially when combined with a little mint.
